data_scope.include: Iranian ballistic missiles (BM) targeting Israel only
exclude: Hezbollah rockets, missiles, UAVs (tracked separately by Alma — NOT in this dataset)
Iranian Shahed/UAV/drone launches (even Iran-origin — not BM)
Iranian BM targeting non-Israel targets (Gulf states, Saudi Arabia, etc.)
data_scope.note_on_alma_waves: alma_waves_* columns = Iran-origin attack waves toward Israel only (Alma definition). Includes both Iranian BM and Iranian drones/UAVs — NOT ballistic-missile-only. Used as proxy for BM activity, not as a BM count.

project_structure.data/israel_daily_estimate.csv: PRIMARY consolidated model input. One row per day, clean numeric schema with short flags. Feb 28–Mar 28.
project_structure.data/inventory.csv: Iranian BM/launcher stock snapshots by weapon type.
project_structure.data/conflicts.md: All unresolved source conflicts and open questions with resolution paths.
project_structure.data/metadata.json: Project metadata, methodology notes, update rounds.
project_structure.data/sources/: Raw per-source data, one subfolder per source type.
project_structure.data/sources/registry.csv: Master source index: URL, tier, type, access status for all sources.
project_structure.data/sources/jinsa/: JINSA PDF data: reports index, global daily BM, country splits, hits by day.
project_structure.data/sources/alma/: Alma data: confirmed report URLs, daily wave series, geographic distribution.
project_structure.data/sources/idf/: IDF official statements: cumulative anchors, interception rates.
project_structure.data/sources/isw/: ISW/UAE MoD daily breakdown: BM/drone/CM at UAE Feb28–Mar24.
project_structure.data/sources/media/: Hebrew+English press: barrage/siren counts, confirmed impact events.
project_structure.data/sources/perplexity/: Perplexity estimates by search round: accepted/rejected/contested with reasons.
project_structure.reports/: Source PDFs from JINSA, ISW, and other primary sources.
project_structure.model/: Python model scripts — NB stochastic model, Z-score monitor, forecasts.

columns.isr_bm: Best estimate BM at Israel that day
columns.alma_waves: Alma daily attack waves (Iran→Israel; includes BM+UAV, not BM-only)
columns.isr_cumul: Running cumulative BM at Israel (computed from isr_bm; cross-checked against IDF anchors)
columns.cluster_pct: Cluster warhead percentage (50%=~half confirmed Mar8-10; >50%=majority confirmed Mar18+; blank=unknown)
columns.notes: Estimation method, data basis, and source details for that day

bm_il_cumul_anchors.scope: all_missiles_5-day_Feb28-Mar4; may include small non-BM fraction

phase_i_conflict.description: Two remaining incompatible readings of Phase I Israel BM counts. See conflicts.md CONFLICT-1 for full analysis.
phase_i_conflict.reading_A_jinsa: 73/57/28/20/9 = 187 total (JINSA Mar5 PDF 'Epic Fury: Against Israel' column — confirmed correct column 2026-03-29)
phase_i_conflict.reading_B_bbc_anchor: ~128 cumulative by Mar4 (BBC Arabic citing IDF)
phase_i_conflict.reading_C_eliminated: 200/105/68/37/20 = 430 — ELIMINATED 2026-03-29: Perplexity misread the 'Rising Lion' (2025 war) column as 2026 Israel data
phase_i_conflict.current_data_treatment: est = BBC-proportioned (50/39/19/14/6); max = JINSA reading A (73/57/28/20/9). JINSA 187 vs BBC 128 is the remaining open conflict.
phase_i_conflict.status: partially_resolved — Reading C eliminated; JINSA 187 vs BBC 128 remains open

data_gaps_current: Mar 28: no JINSA global BM data
Alma anchor conflict Mar21→Mar24: chain 329+8+7+9=353 ≠ 346 stated. 7-wave discrepancy confirmed real (Alma OSINT). Both anchors authoritative; intermediate cumuls (Mar22-23) not reliable.
Mar25 daily=20 is derived (not directly stated by Alma); Statista undercount pattern confirmed for late March.
Alma Mar20-21: Statista daily sum=21 vs Alma combined=29 — 8-wave undercount in Statista for this period; use stated anchor (329) not daily sum.
intercept_pct: 92% confirmed for late-March aggregate only; no daily series
cluster_pct: 50% confirmed through Mar 10 only; unknown thereafter
Bahrain daily BM: only Mar 22–24 known (2 on Mar23, 7 on Mar24)
Kuwait daily BM: only Mar 24 (17) and Mar 27 (4) known
Saudi Arabia BM: only Mar 27 known (6); drone-heavy otherwise

resolved_discrepancies.resolution: All figures internally consistent — different definitions and time windows.

resolved_discrepancies.source: ALMA Mar1 + TIMES_IL (both citing IDF assessment)

resolved_discrepancies.resolution: 438 = global (JINSA final). Israel Day1 = 73 (JINSA Mar5 preliminary). 5-day cumul at Israel = ~128 (BBC/IDF anchor). Conflict unresolved — see phase_i_conflict.
40 = mid-day snapshot (JINSA 3/24 PDF as of 11am ET). 46 = final day count (JINSA 3/25 PDF confirmed). Use 46 as final.
